publicationstmt.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

profiledesc.creation: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on 2020-03-03 00:01:09 -0500.

change.item: This resource was modified by the ArchivesSpace Preprocessor developed by the Harvard Library (https://github.com/harvard-library/archivesspace-preprocessor)

repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

did.abstract: Correspondence, publicity, books, notes, photographs, computer disks, and other documents and records pertaining to the history of baseball and personal papers pertaining to the Seymour family. Also, files of Dorothy Jane (Seymour) Mills relating to her books, A Woman's Work, The Labyrinth, The Scepter, Meatless Meat, and various children's titles.

defitem.label: Contact Information:
defitem.item: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu

bioghist.head: BIOGRAPHICAL NOTE
bioghist.p: Harold Seymour was a baseball scholar and author, Cornell University Ph.D. Class of 1956.

scopecontent.head: COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
scopecontent.p: Correspondence, publicity, books, notes, photographs, computer disks, and other documents and records pertaining to the history of baseball and personal papers pertaining to the Seymour family.
Also, files of Dorothy Jane (Seymour) Mills relating to her books, A Woman's Work, The Labyrinth, The Scepter, Meatless Meat, and various children's titles.

processinfo.head: Processing Information
processinfo.p: In December 2003 boxes 8 through 86 were renumbered.

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: Harold and Dorothy Seymour papers, #4809. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.

Illustrations - No reply or not available

League Rules and Regulations, City of Milwaukee

Ideas and notes for an article on Johnson, Ban

Baseball Clips - high school and before
Directions to Players on Crestons, Falcons, etc.
Clips on Seymour's players - Lohrman, Boell, etc.
Autobiographical - youth notes, list of persons
Nostalgia book - South and Marriage (divorce papers)
transcript of Testimony, in re-investigation of Kavanaugh Charges, National Board of Arbitration

Research notes for Volume 3 The People's Game
Miscellaneous background material and notes for unidentified volumes
Miscellaneous background material and notes for unidentified volumes

did.abstract: Includes books, journals, newsletters, correspondence, sports journals, NASSH programs, Jean Ardell article, various clippings and booklets, printed material, biographical notes, Harold Seymour memorial service account; Ken Burns' Florentine Films unused film, eulogy by Tom Heitz, photos of the Harold Seymour ashes-sprinkling at first base, Cooperstown
